steps.title: Identify the given information
steps.content: We are given a constant production rate of 72 parts per hour and a time period of 4 hours. We need to find the total number of parts produced.

steps.title: Apply the rate formula to find total production
steps.content:
Substituting our values into the rate formula:
$$72 \text{ parts/hour} \times 4 \text{ hours} = 288 \text{ parts}$$
The automated machine will produce 288 parts in 4 hours.
